prompts:
Read SESSION_LOGS/2026-03-20_google_ads_handover.md before anything else.
Task: Generate ads_patch_final.csv for Google Ads Editor.
The source file is C:\Users\andy\Desktop\odefish_final.csv on the desktop (UTF-16 tab-separated, ~72MB). This is the full Google Ads account export for account 876-879-7070 ("Local Search") — the tvantennas suburb network.
The problem: Some ad groups already have 3 Responsive Search Ads, which is Google's limit. Adding new ads without deleting one first causes an import error.
What to do:
1. Read the approved ad copy template from TEMP/build_ads_patch.py on fishbrain — that's the good copy Andy approved. Do not rewrite it.
2. For each ad group with 3+ RSAs: delete the worst performer (lowest Clicks column) by adding a row with Status=Deleted
3. For every ad group: add one new RSA using the approved copy, with the URL read from the existing ads in that campaign (already correct in the CSV — tvantennasjoondalup.com.au etc.)
4. H1 only gets suburb personalisation (e.g. "Joondalup Antenna" or "Morley Starlink") — keep it under 30 chars
5. Write output to C:\Users\andy\Desktop\ads_patch_final.csv
Do NOT: use Sky Signal WA branding, put "Andrew" in suburb-specific headlines, or rewrite the descriptions.
57 groups need a deletion. 287 groups need a new ad. Script it, run it on the desktop via fish_hands, verify row count, done.
